code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut is_pal = true
while i < n
  let a = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, n - 1 - i)
  when Some(c)
    c
  when None
    -1
  end
  if a != b
    is_pal = false
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if is_pal
  print("YES")
else
  print("NO")
end
